mapper.select: SELECT current_val FROM t_erp_bill_sequence WHERE seq_date = #{seqDate} AND bill_type = #{billType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_bill_sequence (seq_date, bill_type, current_val) VALUES (#{seqDate}, #{billType}, #{currentVal})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_bill_sequence SET current_val = current_val + 1 WHERE seq_date = #{seqDate} AND bill_type = #{billType}
UPDATE t_erp_bill_sequence SET current_val = #{currentVal} WHERE seq_date = #{seqDate} AND bill_type = #{billType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_bill_sequence (seq_date, bill_type, current_val) VALUES (#{seqDate}, #{billType}, LAST_INSERT_ID(1)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_val = LAST_INSERT_ID(current_val + 1)
